MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2006 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion To Comper Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Scher for plaintiff and moving party Dale Kenney
Charles Horn for defendant and opposing party Russ Building LLC
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted:
Plaintiff Dale Kenny Motion to compel Special interrogatories
5
Granted. The reservation of the right to amend the response is ordered stricken. The response must be full and complete at the time it is made. If there is a need to amend, it must be made in compliance with CCP Section 2030.310

6 - 17, 19 - 25
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Contention interrogatories are expressly authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure. As the response incorporates other responses or refers to documents, it is inadequate. The responses must be separate and complete.

Further verified responses are to be served on or before March 17, 2006. The Court finds that defendant asserted unmeritorious objections and made evasive responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $2315 are to be paid by April 7, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Request For Admission
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Scher for plaintiff and moving party Dale Kenney
Charles Horn for defendant and opposing party Russ Building LLC
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Dale Kenney Motion to compel request for admissions:
4, 6, 7
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant can respond by stating the definition of specified terms as a preface to its response. It is non-responsive and improper to refer plaintiff to a particular document.
8, 9, 11, 12
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. If defendant claims an inability to either admit or deny the request, the response shall comply with CCP Section 2033.220(c). It is non-responsive and improper to refer plaintiff to a particular document.
10, 14, 16 - 19
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. The answer is non-responsive and is stricken as it asserts both an inability to either admit or deny the request and denies the request.
20
Denied. The objections are overruled and stricken. The response is otherwise sufficient. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Req. For Sanctions And Statement Pursuant To Rule Oc Court 335
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Scher for plaintiff and moving party Dale Kenney
Charles Horn for defendant and opposing party Russ Building LLC
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted:
Plaintiff Dale Kenney's motion to compel Form interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part:
Form interrogatories
12.1, 12.6
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond.
12.2
Denied.
12.3
Granted in part. Defendant is ordered to respond only to the extent that counsel obtained an independently written or recorded statement from a person interviewed by counsel or his agent.
15.1
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond. The reservation of the right to amend the response is ordered stricken. The response must be full and complete at the time it is made. If there is a need to amend, it must be made in compliance with CCP Section 2030.310. As the response incorporates other responses, it is inadequate. The response must be separate and complete.
16.1 - 16.6, 16.9, 16.10
Granted. The objection of premature is overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond.
17.1
granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Continued To Mar-14-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 305

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
